info.name: Journeys
info.summary: cluster images by time and location
info.description:
# Automatic Photo Album Creation for Nextcloud
Automatically cluster your images into journeys (vacations/trips) and create albums for each journey. **Requires the Memories app!**
## ✨ Features - **🗺️ Location & Time Clustering:** Group images by when and where they were taken - **🗂️ Album Creation:** Albums are created automatically for each journey - **⚙️ Customizable:** Control minimum cluster size, time gap, and distance thresholds - **🎥 Video Rendering:** Turn journey albums into MP4 highlight reels. Renders run as background jobs (the settings page returns instantly) and land in `Documents/Journeys Movies/`. Requires `ffmpeg` on the server. - **📚 Mobile-friendly journey browser:** Compact card list with year, month and location filters plus a `▶ Watch` shortcut to existing rendered videos — built for instances with many journeys. - **🧵 Smart Merging:** Adjacent clusters in the same country (within one week) are automatically stitched together, so multi-city road trips and long vacations with rest days stay as one journey
## 🚀 OCC Command Usage
php occ journeys:cluster-create-albums <user>
## 🏠 Using your home location (default) Journeys segments the timeline into **near home** and **away from home** and applies sensible defaults for each to capture local days vs. trips.
## ⏰ Runs automatically A background job runs **daily** to cluster newly added photos, and you’ll receive a **notification** whenever new albums are created.
## 🏷️ How album names are created Album titles are generated from the **resolved place name** and the **date range** of the cluster, e.g. `Iceland — Aug 12–19, 2024`.
info.changelog:
0.23.0 (2026-04-26)

  • Settings: Redesigned the journeys list as a compact, mobile-friendly card grid. Each card shows dates, photo count and place inline; the previous HTML tables are gone.
  • Settings: New filter toolbar above the journeys list — year, month, and free-text location/name search with a result counter, for managing instances with many journeys.
  • Settings: New "Rendered videos" section lists every .mp4 in Documents/Journeys Movies/ with mtime and size, plus an "Open in Files" link.
  • Settings: Per-journey ▶ Watch badge appears when a rendered video exists for that cluster and links straight to it in the Files app.
  • Video rendering: Triggering a render from the settings page now enqueues a RenderClusterVideoJob instead of running ffmpeg synchronously inside the HTTP request, so the page returns instantly and you no longer have to keep the tab open through a multi-minute render.

0.22.4 (2026-04-26)

  • Video rendering: Cap ffmpeg's decoder, filter, and encoder thread pools to 2 each (-threads 2 -filter_threads 2 -filter_complex_threads 2) to bound peak memory in zoompan/xfade filter graphs. Without this, ffmpeg defaults to nproc and concurrent full-resolution frame buffers had OOM-killed or frozen multi-core servers rendering large albums.

0.22.3 (2026-04-25)

  • Video rendering: Per-cluster image cap now scales with trip length so multi-week journeys produce longer recap videos. The previous fixed default of 80 images stays in effect for trips up to a week, then climbs by 4 per extra day up to an absolute cap of 120 (≈3:30 at the default 2.5 s per image). --max-images still acts as an explicit override.

0.22.2 (2026-04-23)

  • Clustering: Merge pass now absorbs tiny GPS-noise clusters (below minClusterSize) that sit between two same-country clusters, so a bogus single-photo coordinate in the middle of a trip no longer prevents the trip from being stitched. Observed on a New Zealand journey that split around two 1–2 image clusters with device-default Hong Kong coordinates.
  • Clustering debug: --debug-splits now prints MERGE (through noise) with the absorbed cluster's size, fileid, datetime, and coordinates.

0.22.1 (2026-04-23)

  • Clustering debug: --debug-splits now prints NO MERGE events when the merge pass rejects a pair on country grounds (null on either side, or name mismatch), including resolved country strings, image coordinates, and fileids. Helps diagnose cases where adjacent clusters in the same country are not being stitched.

0.22.0 (2026-04-23)

  • Compatibility: Declare support for Nextcloud 33 (max-version bumped from 32 to 33).

0.21.0 (2026-04-22)

  • Clustering: New post-clustering merge pass stitches adjacent clusters in the same country within 7 days, fixing over-splitting of multi-city road trips and long vacations with rest days. Away-from-home only; near-home clusters never merge.
  • Settings: New "Merge adjacent journeys in the same country (within one week)" toggle (default on).
  • CLI: New --no-merge flag; --debug-splits now prints MERGE events.

0.20.3 (2026-04-22)

  • Video rendering: Extracted shared primitives from portrait and landscape renderers into a new VideoRenderPrimitives trait (~350 LOC duplication removed). No behavior change; both orientations verified end-to-end.

0.20.2 (2026-02-13)

  • Cron: Reduced recentCutoffDays from 5 to 2 in the daily clustering job to align with the OCC command default.

0.20.1 (2026-02-13)

  • Fix: Moved VideoRenderJobScheduler service definition inside the XML structure in services.xml so auto-generated video rendering jobs are correctly scheduled by the daily clustering cron.

0.20.0 (2026-02-10)

  • Clustering: Add optional date range scoping (from/to) to limit which photos are clustered.
  • UI: Personal Settings now let you set an optional "Only cluster from/to" range; daily cron honors it.
  • CLI: Add --from, --to, and --last-years options; if no CLI range is provided, the command falls back to the user's configured UI range.

0.19.6 (2026-01-05)

  • Cron: Daily clustering job now logs “no images found for user” as info instead of warning.

0.19.5 (2025-12-18)

  • Clustering fix: When --include-shared-images is enabled, only include images from incoming shares (exclude outbound shares shared by the user).

0.19.4 (2025-12-18)

  • Clustering: Exclude generated videos in Documents/Journeys Movies from clustering input.
  • Clustering: More robust timestamp parsing & deterministic sorting to avoid spurious splits when including shared images.
  • Clustering debug: --debug-splits output now includes raw boundary indices plus source (home/shared) and location context (loc=, prevGeo).

0.19.3 (2025-12-17)

  • Clustering debug: New CLI flag --debug-splits prints why clustering starts a new cluster (time/distance exceeded amounts and home-aware boundaries).

0.19.2 (2025-12-17)

  • Clustering fix: Shared image inclusion is now correctly scoped to the shared mount root subtree (prevents pulling unrelated files from other users' storages).

0.19.1 (2025-12-16)

  • Clustering debug: When clustering with shared images enabled, the OCC output now prints which shared images were included per created cluster (fileid, path, datetaken, datetaken_ts).

0.19.0 (2025-12-16)

  • Video rendering: Verified compatibility with FFmpeg 7.x (CFR handling and fades); recommend FFmpeg 7.1+.

0.18.3 (2025-12-09)

  • Video rendering: Landscape renderer now chunks like portrait when any source image exceeds 13 MP; otherwise it runs a single pass. Chunk/merge progress logging aligned with portrait.

0.18.2 (2025-12-09)

  • Video rendering: Portrait renderer chunks automatically when any source image exceeds 13 MP; otherwise it runs a single pass.

0.18.1 (2025-12-05)

  • Settings UI: Redesigned the personal settings page with Nc components, card layout, and inline auto-saving toggles.

0.18.0 (2025-12-05)

  • Videos: Manual Photos albums can now be rendered from the settings UI or CLI with their actual album titles.
  • CLI: journeys:list-clusters prints both journey clusters and manual albums in a formatted table.

0.17.2 (2025-12-05)

  • Clustering: OCC command now streams cluster creation details as albums are created.

0.17.1 (2025-12-04)

  • Albums: Detect and skip screenshot-style images (no EXIF, PNG/WebP, screen keywords) during clustering.

0.17.0 (2025-12-04)

  • Video rendering:Prefer fotos with faces for video generation
  • Settings: "Prefer photos with people when building videos" now remembers its saved value after refresh.

0.16.0 (2025-11-28)

  • Shared images: Personal settings toggle now includes shared-by-others mounts in clustering and video selection.
  • Diagnostics: OCC clustering command prints per-source image counts (home, group, shared) to help verify coverage.
  • UI: Personal settings warn when shared inclusion yields no matches.

0.15.1 (2025-11-24)

  • Fallback: Place resolution now automatically falls back to Memories tables when GIS functions are unavailable or fail.
  • Upgrade note: Drop existing Journeys albums and re-run clustering to rebuild album titles with the new fallback.

0.15.0 (2025-11-24)

  • Selection: Video image selection now prefers photos with faces when Recognize data is available.
  • Settings: Added personal setting “Prefer photos with people when building videos” (enabled by default).
  • CLI: Added --no-face-boost flag to render commands to disable face boosting per run.

0.14.0 (2025-11-20)

  • Feature: Videos now display cluster name as title overlay on the first image (4 seconds with fade in/out). Font size automatically scales to fit 80% of video width.
  • UI: Added "Show cluster name title on videos" checkbox in Personal Settings to toggle title display (enabled by default).
  • CLI: Added --no-title flag to both render commands to disable title overlay.

0.13.2 (2025-11-20)

  • Fix: Video rendering no longer hangs when processing GCam motion clips. Fixed frame padding calculation to use exact frame counts.
  • Change: Rendered videos now always include timestamp suffix to avoid file conflicts.

0.13.1 (2025-11-19)

  • Feature: Added --ffmpeg-verbose CLI flag to both render commands for debugging.

0.13.0 (2025-11-19)

  • Fix: Ken Burns effect now works correctly on still images following GCam motion videos in both portrait and landscape renderers (PTS normalization).

0.12.1 (2025-11-19)

  • Fix: journeys:remove-all-albums now only removes Journeys-created albums, preserving manually-created albums.

0.12.0 (2025-11-18)

  • Video: Landscape video renderer now supports GCam Motion Photos (Live Photos).
  • CLI: Added --no-motion flag to journeys:render-cluster-video-landscape command.

0.11.1 (2025-11-13)

  • Meta: Patch version bump.

0.11.0 (2025-11-13)

  • Naming: Near-home clusters now append frequent sublocality names to make album titles more specific.

0.9.2 (2025-11-06)

  • Notifications: Don't filter out notifications from other apps.

0.9.1 (2025-11-05)

  • UX: Time thresholds in Personal Settings are now configured in hours (allowing decimals, e.g. 0.5 = 30m).
  • Docs: Brief documentation update to reflect the change.

0.9.0 (2025-11-05)

  • UI: Separate, clearly grouped near-home and away-from-home thresholds in Personal Settings.
  • CLI: When arguments are omitted, OCC now falls back to the user's saved settings (including near/away thresholds) and prints the effective settings at the start of a run.
  • Cron: Daily clustering job honors per-user settings from the UI for both global and near/away thresholds.
  • Debug logging: Added detailed logs for cluster splits (time vs distance) and per-segment thresholds (near/away) at debug level.

0.8.2 (2025-11-04)

  • Group Folders (optional): Added UI toggle and --include-group-folders CLI flag to include photos from Group Folders and other mounts in clustering (default: off).
  • Album assignment: Albums now add photos by fileid (mount-agnostic) instead of path, fixing empty albums when clustering Group Folder images.

0.8.1 (2025-11-01)

  • Latest-first cluster order in settings; minor UI polish; internal job scheduling refactor.

0.7.9 (2025-10-14)

  • Audio: Updated soundtrack sources to 128kbps and added gentle fade‑out at the end of videos.

0.7.8 (2025-10-12)

  • Selection: Coverage-first, two-pass image selection spreads picks across the whole journey.

0.7.5 (2025-10-10)

  • Video stacks: Portrait videos now occasionally include 3-wide landscape stacks with horizontal slides.

0.7.4 (2025-10-10)

  • Video stacks: Portrait videos now occasionally include 3-wide landscape stacks with horizontal slides.
  • Pacing: Each stacked row pauses at center (~2s) with quicker slide-in/out for a more dynamic feel.
  • Selection: Video selection no longer filters out landscape images; renderer mixes them automatically.

0.7.3 (2025-10-07)

  • CLI cleanup: Removed the deprecated --home-aware flag; home-aware clustering remains enabled by default and can still be disabled with --no-home-aware.
  • Granularity: Added --min-cluster-size option to control the minimum images required for journey albums (replaces the positional argument) and raised the default to 5 photos.
  • Recency threshold: Default skip window for recent clusters is now 48 hours (was 5 days) to surface new journeys sooner.

0.7.2 (2025-09-29)

  • Audio: Journey videos now include (one of three randomly selected) soundtrack by mobygratis .

0.7.1 (2025-09-26)

  • Improvement: Added Ken Burns motion with crossfades

0.7.0 (2025-09-26)

  • New: Render Journey albums into MP4 videos directly from the personal settings page or via occ journeys:render-cluster-video <user> <albumId>.
  • Requirement: The Nextcloud server must have ffmpeg available in PATH for rendering to succeed.

0.6.0 (2025-09-19)

  • Packaging: Release workflow now builds the frontend before packaging to ensure fresh assets are shipped.

0.5.8 (2025-09-19)

  • Settings (#7): Personal settings page is now accessible to all logged-in users (per-user configuration; no admin required).
  • Security: Re-enabled CSRF protection on settings endpoints (removed @NoCSRFRequired annotations).

0.5.7 (2025-09-15)

  • Meta: Version bump.

0.5.6 (2025-09-15)

  • Cleanup: Removed legacy appinfo/app.php since the app uses IBootstrap via lib/AppInfo/Application.php. This eliminates the recurring log warning about app.php not being loaded.

0.5.5 (2025-09-10)

  • Default behavior change: Clustering now uses your home location by default to segment near-home vs away-from-home and apply appropriate thresholds.
  • New flag: --no-home-aware to disable home-based segmentation and use a single global set of thresholds.
  • Deprecated: --home-aware (no longer required; default is on).
  • Docs: Updated description to explain how home location is used and how to opt out.

0.5.4 (2025-09-09)

  • Notifications: Send a single aggregated notification per run (instead of one per album) with a quick link to open Photos.

0.5.3 (2025-09-08)

  • DB migration: Added start_dt and end_dt columns plus index to journeys_cluster_albums for reliable incremental clustering.
  • Fail-fast tracking: Album tracking now throws on DB errors instead of silently ignoring them.

0.5.2 (2025-09-08)

  • Fix: Prevent division by zero when interpolating locations for adjacent images with identical datetaken.

0.5.1 (2025-09-07)

  • Album creation safety: No longer reuse existing albums by name. On name collision (e.g., manually created album), the cluster album is skipped and a warning is logged.
  • Incremental fallback: When no end_dt is recorded yet, derive the latest cluster end from tracked albums to set the incremental boundary (no title matching required).

0.5.0 (2025-09-07)

  • Incremental clustering (default): Only process images taken after the latest tracked cluster end.
  • New OCC flags: --from-scratch to fully rebuild clusters; --recent-cutoff-days to control skipping of very recent trips (default 5; 0 disables).
  • DB migration: Track start_dt/end_dt for each clusterer-created album to support incremental runs.

0.4.3 (2025-09-05)

  • Skip no-location-only clusters: Clusters composed entirely of images without coordinates are no longer turned into albums. Reduces noise from placeholder “Journey # (date range)” albums.

0.4.2 (2025-09-04)

  • Clustering robustness: Prevent time-only tails (images without coordinates) from bridging over large spatial jumps by anchoring distance checks to the last-known geolocated photo within a cluster.

0.4.1 (2025-09-03)

  • Deterministic purge of cluster albums: Introduced DB-backed tracking table for clusterer-created albums (per user), used during purge instead of folder tag/title heuristics. Prevents accumulation of albums across runs.
  • Docs: Clarified deterministic purge behavior on re-runs; added upgrade notes.
  • Cleanup: Removed runtime table creation; rely on app migration for schema.
  • DB prefix fix: Use *PREFIX* placeholder in SQL instead of accessing connection prefix.

0.4.0 (2025-09-03)

  • Home-aware clustering: Segment timeline into near-home and away-from-home blocks; cluster each block independently.
  • Near-home alignment: when left at built-in defaults, near-home time gap aligns to global, and distance aligns to global but is capped at 25km for finer local clustering.
  • Away thresholds default to 36h / 50km and can be tuned via CLI to better handle multi-day gaps during long trips.

0.3.2 (2025-07-27)

  • Default maxDistanceKm for clustering is now 50.0 (was 100.0)

0.3.1 (2025-07-20)

  • SystemTag-only album identification: New albums are created without postfix, identified and managed solely via SystemTags.
  • Legacy albums with postfix are still purged via fallback logic.
  • Removal of postfix from new album names.

0.3.0-alpha (2025-07-20)

  • Spatial constraint for interpolation: Only interpolate image locations if the two neighboring images are within 1km of each other.
  • Stricter time gap for single neighbor: When only one reference image is available, the time gap must not be larger than 1 hour.
  • Improved clustering accuracy: Prevented assignment of interpolated locations over large distances.
info.author: thrillfall
